generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired civil defense coordinator, I've seen firsthand how vital community preparedness is for national security. The current administration's cuts to local emergency response training programs are putting us all at risk. We can't afford to ignore this gap in our defenses. #CivilDefenseMatters #NationalSecurityFirst
